emails.subject: FW: PCSNA
emails.body: Do you know when you will have yesterday scheduled? We need that info to complete our daily reports and I need to let some people know when they will be available? Thanks, Laurel

emails.subject: RE: PCSNA
emails.body: Laurel, I just auto scheduled through the 29th. We have had major system problems, We apologize for the delay. Let me know if this worked. I'm still not 100% confident regarding our system. lisa

emails.subject: RE: PCSNA
emails.body: I can see every day except yesterday. Are you completely done with the autoshcedule process for that day? Is so can we rerun it? Laurel

emails.subject: RE: PCSNA
emails.body: I just re autoscheduled the 26th. Let me know. Thanks lisa

emails.subject: RE: PCSNA
emails.body: It looks good now. If we ever have this problem again, could you please call and let me know. (713-853-4873). We use the numbers for the power reports every morning and we do not know if they numbers are not correct. Thanks, Laurel
